name: Torralbenc
description: The restaurant of the Torralbenc agrotourism estate, a 74-hectare farm with its own winery on the road from Maó to Cala en Porter (Alaior). Honest, refined Mediterranean cooking —wood-fired grills, fish and meat, rice dishes— under the guidance of chef Gorka Txapartegi (Alameda, Hondarribia), with vegetables, eggs, olive oil and wine from the estate itself, served in a restored former harvest building. Michelin Guide recommended in 2026; the hotel has held one Michelin Key since November 2024.

practicalInfo.acceso: Torralbenc estate, Maó–Cala en Porter road (Alaior). Approximate location: confirm the exact spot on the official website.
practicalInfo.horario: Hotel and restaurant are seasonal (spring–autumn); confirm 2026 dates and hours on the official website.
practicalInfo.servicios: Bookings: +34 971 37 72 11 · info@torralbenc.com. Six-course sunset dinners and cave dinners, by reservation.

seo.description: Torralbenc (Alaior): Mediterranean cooking with produce and wine from its own 74-hectare estate, Michelin Guide recommended 2026, at a hotel holding a Michelin Key.
